title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 27 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 27/07/2021
Image reference: 2021-07-27_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-27-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Aframax values have firmed slightly. Small Chemical Tankers Beech Galaxy & Lime Galaxy (20,000 DWT, Jan 2007 & Dec 2008, Usuki Zosensho) sold in an en bloc deal to USA buyers for USD 23.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 24.75 mil
Small Chemical Tanker Celsius Manhattan (19,800 DWT, Oct 2006, Kitanihon Zosen) sold to Taihua Ship Management for USD 11.50 mil, VV value USD 10.38 mil - SS Due. Bulker: Softening in modern Supramax values.
